title: Score Distribution - Focused / Distracted
description: Boxplot of probe scores for positive (focused) and negative (distracted) evaluation texts at best layer 10. One score per eval text. Mann-Whitney U test on 20 vs 20 independent scores.

statistics.note: Each eval text produces one independent score at the best layer. Both Mann-Whitney U and Welch t-test compare n_high vs n_low independent prompt-level scores.
